subject: English
chapter: Verghese Kurien—I Too Had A Dream

activities_projects.title: Leadership Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse leadership qualities demonstrated by Verghese Kurien
steps: Read the chapter carefully
Identify the leadership challenges faced by Verghese Kurien
Explain how he solved each challenge
Write a short case study explaining his leadership strategies
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyse leadership strategies and decision-making processes
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Research Project: The White Revolution
activities_projects.objective: Investigate the economic and social impact of the White Revolution in India
steps: Research the White Revolution and Operation Flood
Collect data on milk production before and after the movement
Present your findings using charts or graphs
Explain the role of Verghese Kurien in this transformation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand historical and economic impact of agricultural movements
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of research and quality of presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Data Interpretation Activity
activities_projects.objective: Interpret data related to dairy production and growth
steps: Study provided data about milk production in India
Analyse how production changed after the White Revolution
Write your observations in your notebook
Discuss the significance of these changes in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical thinking and data interpretation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of observations and interpretation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Critical Thinking Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the importance of cooperative movements
steps: Discuss how cooperative societies support farmers
Compare cooperative models with private businesses
Write your opinion on which system benefits farmers more
Present your arguments to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical thinking and reasoning skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Strength of arguments and clarity of reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Biography Study
activities_projects.objective: Compare Verghese Kurien with another national leader or innovator
steps: Choose another inspiring personality such as Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam
Research their contributions
Compare their achievements with those of Verghese Kurien
Write a comparative report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to analyse similarities and differences between leaders
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of comparison and research quality (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Debate: Role of Vision in Success
steps: Divide the class into two groups
One group argues that vision is the key to success
The other group argues that teamwork is more important
Conduct a structured debate
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve logical reasoning and public speaking skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of arguments and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Project: Dairy Cooperative Model
activities_projects.objective: Design a model explaining how dairy cooperatives work
steps: Research how milk cooperatives function
Create a diagram showing milk collection, processing, and distribution
Explain the benefits of cooperative systems for farmers
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary and Concept Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand technical and contextual vocabulary from the chapter
steps: Identify difficult words and phrases from the chapter
Find their meanings and contextual usage
Write sentences using each word
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of meanings and sentence construction (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Problem-Solving Scenario
activities_projects.objective: Apply problem-solving skills to real-world agricultural issues
steps: Imagine you are leading a dairy cooperative
Identify three problems faced by farmers
Suggest practical solutions inspired by Verghese Kurien’s ideas
Write a short report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students apply knowledge to real-life problem-solving situations
activities_projects.evaluation: Practicality and clarity of solutions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Analytical Essay: Dreams and Social Change
activities_projects.objective: Develop advanced writing and analytical skills
steps: Write an essay explaining how dreams can create social change
Use examples from Verghese Kurien’s life
Include introduction, analysis, and conclusion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical writing and analytical thinking
activities_projects.evaluation: Structure, argument quality, and language usage (10 marks)
